tech_news.title: A major hacking tool has leaked online, putting millions of iPhones at risk. Here’s what you need to know. - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Here’s what we know, and what you need to know, about Coruna and DarkSword, two advanced iPhone hacking tools discovered by security researchers. DarkSword has now leaked online.
